ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT t_sales.billing_no AS "請求番号",
    t_sales.billing_date AS "請求日",
        CASE
            WHEN (m_customer_billing.invoice_notice_id IS NOT NULL) THEN m_customer_billing.invoice_notice_id
            ELSE t_sales.billing_comp_id
        END AS "通知先ID"
   FROM (t_sales
     JOIN m_customer_billing ON ((m_customer_billing.customer_id = t_sales.billing_comp_id)))
  WHERE (t_sales.delete_flg = 0)
  GROUP BY t_sales.billing_no, t_sales.billing_date,
        CASE
            WHEN (m_customer_billing.invoice_notice_id IS NOT NULL) THEN m_customer_billing.invoice_notice_id
            ELSE t_sales.billing_comp_id
        END;
